description: Binary injury risk classifier for Premier League players over a 2-week horizon. Stacked ensemble of CatBoost, LightGBM, and XGBoost base learners with a Logistic Regression meta-learner.
trained_on: Historical player stats, injury records, and match data (1992-2024). Temporal train/val/test split (60/20/20) to prevent leakage.

severity_model.description: Predicts injury duration tier: short (<7 days), medium (7-28 days), long (>28 days).

notes: Test set is 93% positive (injury events) due to temporal split — later seasons have more coverage. Precision/recall reflect this distribution.
ROC-AUC of 0.82 is the most dataset-independent metric.
Model is re-evaluated each time retrain_model.py runs. This card is overwritten with fresh metrics.
For educational and portfolio use only. Not for medical or betting decisions.
